caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing black over-ear headphones and a purple and white striped shirt, is captured in a close-up shot against a neutral wall. To her left, a yellow curtain with a thin blue border hangs vertically, and a small portion of a grey surface is visible behind her to the right. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in white at the bottom left of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, shifting from a neutral expression with her mouth slightly open to a wide, cheerful smile that reveals her teeth. Her head tilts slightly and her facial expression brightens, though she remains centered in the frame and her attire and surroundings stay consistent throughout the clip.
